The '''Great Spirit''' of the forest was, according to [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] legend, the spirit that controlled all life on the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon of Endor]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Adventures of Teebo: A Tale of Magic and Suspense]]''
